summary: TarrantREI full-stack tested. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases pass against public URL (root, 17 filters, properties list/detail/nearby, REO/Law Firm/Out-of-State filters, search, saved CRUD, owner classifier matrix, AI analysis via Claude Sonnet 4.6 returned 947 chars). Frontend: Mobile (390x844) Expo web preview verified end-to-end - listings load with header/search/filter chips/36 cards, REO chip drops to 7 results, Law Firm chip filters correctly, search 'Arlington' narrows results, property detail shows hero/owner badge/all 5 score bars/financials/nearby/AI sections, Run AI Analysis returns narrative, hero-save bookmark works (verified via /api/saved=1), tab navigation Listings/Saved/Settings all functional.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - cosmetic, from a third-party RN web shim; non-blocking

action_items: Optional: address deprecation warning props.pointerEvents -> style.pointerEvents (cosmetic only, not blocking)
Optional: Expo SDK 54 minor version mismatch reported by Metro (expo 54.0.34 vs expected 54.0.35) - no functional impact observed
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~560 line file; consider splitting into routers/, classifiers/, scoring/, seed/ modules if it grows further (currently acceptable).
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded everywhere via {'_id': 0}.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read from .env; AI analysis caches results in db.ai_analysis to avoid re-billing - good.
All frontend interactive elements have testID; mobile touch targets adequate.
seed_data_creation: None created by tests. The 1 saved record from playwright run was cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://cash-house-finder.preview.emergentagent.com/api. 36 seeded properties auto-loaded on first startup. AI analysis endpoint takes ~6-10s on first call (cached after). Frontend testIDs verified: listings-header, search-box, search-input, clear-search, filter-row, filter-{key}, result-count, property-list, property-card-{id}, property-card-{id}-save, listings-loading/error/empty, retry-button, property-detail-scroll, back-button, hero-save, section-owner/scoring/financials/nearby/ai, owner-badge, score-{investment|wholesale|flip|rental|risk}, ai-analyze-btn, ai-narrative, cta-contact, cta-save, saved-list, saved-empty.
